signal_detail: Actively hiring Frontend Engineer II (React/TypeScript) and Senior Backend Engineer on Greenhouse. Cap table management platform — complex fintech UI with equity dashboards.

Frontend engineers own interactive features and product direction
qualification_reason: Hot: Fintech (equity/cap table) with complex dashboard UI — strong sector fit. Confirmed Canada hiring with pension match. Actively hiring frontend engineers with React/TypeScript. YC-backed, 8000+ customers. Direct match to candidate's data-dense UI and config-driven experience.

signal_detail: Raised $70M Series B led by a16z and Iconiq just 12 weeks after last raise — signals rapid growth. AI-native ERP replacing NetSuite/Sage Intacct. Hiring full-stack engineers (React, TypeScript, Vue.js). Customers include Bitwarden, Windsurf, Postscript. Remote-first with offices in NYC and Barcelona.
qualification_reason: Warm: Series B $70M fintech (accounting ERP) with strong sector fit — complex workflow UI, dashboards, config-driven. React/TypeScript in stack. Remote-first but no confirmed Canada hiring yet. Massive funding signals rapid team expansion.
notes: Check if remote-first includes Canada. Back-to-back raises signal urgency. Strong product-experience alignment with candidate's schema-driven configurator work.

signal_detail: Raised $80M Series B at $800M valuation. AI observability platform — evals + observability in one workflow. Used by Notion, Stripe, Zapier, Vercel, Ramp. Hiring SWEs for UI architecture and data visualization. Also hiring technical sourcer to scale engineering team.
tech_signals: Hiring SWEs for UI architecture and data visualization
qualification_reason: Warm: AI observability platform used by top companies (Stripe, Notion, Vercel) — strong sector fit (observability dashboards, data viz). $80M Series B signals major growth. Hiring SWEs for frontend work. Canada eligibility unclear — needs research.
notes: Check if remote includes Canada. Product overlaps with candidate's monitoring dashboard experience. Customer base (Stripe, Ramp, Vercel) indicates high engineering bar.

signal_detail: Raised $110M Series B for OpenTelemetry-native observability platform. Founded 2023, raised $154M total. Hiring Lead/Senior Website Developer (Next.js, TypeScript, Astro). Self-described 'massive growth phase'. 4 open positions on Glassdoor.

notes: EU-focused observability company. If they expand to remote-North-America hiring, becomes warm/hot immediately. Founded by DeepMind/observability veterans.

signal_detail: Emerged from stealth with $255M Series A at $1.2B valuation. Built by DeepMind alumni. Large Tabular Model (NEXUS) for enterprise data — predictive intelligence and forecasting. Angel investors include Datadog CEO Olivier Pomel, Perplexity CEO, Wiz CEO, Brex co-founder. Planning rapid team growth across research, engineering, and go-to-market.
tech_signals: Integrating with Databricks, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric
qualification_reason: Warm: Massive Series A ($255M) data platform with DeepMind pedigree — strong sector fit (data platform, enterprise). Datadog CEO angel investor signals observability/data-viz DNA. Planning rapid engineering growth. Canada eligibility unknown — needs research. Signal is strong but location/hiring details sparse.
notes: Very early stage post-stealth. When they start hiring frontend for data visualization/dashboards, could be excellent fit. Monitor careers page closely.

signal_detail: Hiring aggressively for embedded systems roles — Senior Embedded Systems Engineer (Connectivity, Audio), Staff Embedded Systems Engineer, Director of Embedded Systems Engineering. All positions remote US or Canada ($180K-$280K + equity). Healthcare monitoring hardware company building on-device software and firmware. No frontend role posted yet — they need UI for device management/monitoring dashboards.

qualification_reason: Warm: Healthcare IoT company hiring multiple embedded/hardware roles (remote US/Canada confirmed) but no frontend yet — classic adjacent-role signal. When they build dashboards for device monitoring, candidate's hardware education (ХНУРЭ) + frontend skills is a rare combination. Strong Canada eligibility.
notes: Hardware-adjacent signal. Candidate's radio engineering education from ХНУРЭ is a competitive advantage here. Monitor for frontend/dashboard roles.

signal_detail: Raised $26.7M Series A. Global payments/banking-as-a-service via single API — 180+ countries for FX/SWIFT, 140+ for local payouts. Founded by software engineers for software engineers. Hiring Staff Engineer for scalable systems. Total funding $40.7M since 2018.
qualification_reason: Cold: Fintech payments infrastructure with moderate sector fit (API/developer-facing but not dashboard-heavy). Series A is early. No Canada signals. Small team in Austin. Worth monitoring for growth but too many unknowns now.
